topic.what: Landmark internal medicine textbook containing sections on 'Catarrhal Gastritis' reflecting late 19th-century understanding.
topic.how: Clinical synthesis of contemporary knowledge framing gastritis as a catarrhal (mucus-secreting) process.
topic.why_matters: Snapshot of gastritis understanding at the hinge between pre-modern and modern medicine — before bacteriology transformed the field.

characteristics.what_it_measures: Value as a time-capsule of medical understanding

novelty: Systematized clinical gastritis knowledge at a pivotal historical moment
